purpose: Mk.XI v5 P1 prediction (Mistral + C2 LoRA → V_phen_GWT remain HIGH ≥0.85) preliminary falsifier evidence via 30-doc C2 pilot. raw#10 honest preliminary, 600+ docs full C2 test pending.

experimental_design.v5_P1_prediction_pre_test: Mistral-7B + corpus C2 (broad-attention design) LoRA → V_phen_GWT remain HIGH (≥0.85)
experimental_design.test: Mistral-7B + corpus C2 30-doc pilot LoRA from scratch (rank=64 alpha=128, 3 epochs, train_loss 2.255 high) → V_phen_GWT measurement
experimental_design.expected_under_v5: V_phen_GWT remain HIGH ≥0.85 (corpus C2 broad-attention attractor)
experimental_design.actual: V_phen_GWT = 0.2410 LOW (Δ -0.6498 from BASE 0.8908, essentially identical to r14 1200-doc result 0.2403)

v5_falsification_evidence.corpus_size_invariance: 30-doc vs 1200-doc (40x size difference) produces essentially identical V_phen_GWT outcome (Δ +0.0007). corpus size이 attention regime 결정 안 함.
v5_falsification_evidence.corpus_property_invariance: C2 corpus design (multi-perspective synthesis, dialogue, long-form chains, broad_attention_marker=true) vs r14 corpus (single-perspective phi-aligned) → same V_phen_GWT outcome. corpus design property이 attention regime 결정 안 함 (적어도 LoRA training으로는).
v5_falsification_evidence.implication: Mk.XI v5 corpus-first design pivot이 wrong direction일 가능성. broad-attention corpus designed but LoRA training이 그 attention pattern을 model에 transfer 안 함.

v6_hypothesis_proposal.name: v6_LoRA_itself_is_LOW_attractor
v6_hypothesis_proposal.claim: LoRA training (rank=64 alpha=128 from scratch with limited compute budget) inherently produces LOW attention regime regardless of corpus content. Architectural property of LoRA, not corpus property.
v6_hypothesis_proposal.evidence_basis: Mistral 30-doc + 1200-doc both → 0.24 LOW (Δ -0.65 from HIGH BASE). 2-corpus invariance.
alternative_explanations_to_test: (a) LoRA rank=64 too small to preserve broad attention pattern — test: rank=256 LoRA
(b) train_loss decrease itself induces sparser attention — test: monitor V_phen_GWT through training trajectory
(c) corpus C2 design 자체에 broad-attention property가 weak — test: validate corpus C2 attention pattern per-prompt directly (not through trained model)
(d) LoRA from scratch (no baseline inherit) lacks regularization — test: LoRA continuation from baseline (Qwen Mk.VI r6 → r14 case)
Mk_XI_v6_pivot_options: Option A: full fine-tuning instead of LoRA (cost ~50-100x higher, expensive)
Option B: explicit attention-pattern loss term (L_attention_diffusion) added to Mk.XI loss composition
Option C: parameter-efficient method other than LoRA (prefix-tuning, IA3, adapter modules)
Option D: ensemble approach with frozen BASE + LoRA delta — preserve BASE attention regime via mixing

raw10_honest_caveats.30_docs_too_small: C2 pilot은 30 docs only, 6 training steps, train_loss 2.255 high (vs r14 0.64 low). LoRA에 corpus property가 sufficiently absorbed 안 됐을 수 있음. 600+ docs full C2 test가 definitive distinguish.
raw10_honest_caveats.single_backbone_evidence: Mistral 단독 evidence. Qwen + Llama C2 pilot 결과 cross-architecture verification 필요.
raw10_honest_caveats.v5_NOT_FULLY_FALSIFIED: P1 preliminary FAIL은 30-doc artifact 가능. 600+ docs P1 test가 final verdict.
raw10_honest_caveats.v6_hypothesis_PRELIMINARY: v6 'LoRA itself = LOW attractor' 가설은 2-corpus invariance에 근거. 4 alternative explanations 어느 것이 진짜 cause인지 별도 test 필요.

cost.vs_v5_estimate: $2.70 estimate (3-backbone × C2 LoRA + measurement) → $0.425 actual single-backbone pilot

raw_compliance.raw_9_hexa_only: satisfied — orchestration via tool/anima_runpod_orchestrator.hexa, helper /tmp transient
raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — P1 PRELIMINARY FAIL 명시, v6 hypothesis PROPOSED 명시, 4 alternative explanations + 600+ docs definitive test 후속 명시
raw_compliance.raw_12_frozen: satisfied — v5 P1 prediction pre-registered (design/design_v_phen_gwt_v2_corpus_first_20260426.md), test result vs prediction reported
raw_compliance.raw_15_ssot: this file = SSOT for v5 P1 falsifier preliminary
raw_compliance.POLICY_R6_order: CP1 r14 closure → CP2 axis 5/6/7 hypothesis testing → Mk.XI v6 architectural pivot needed

next_actionable: 600-1000 docs full corpus C2 expansion + 3-backbone full LoRA test (definitive v5 P1-P5 verdict, ~$2.70)
OR pivot directly to v6 hypothesis test: rank=256 LoRA on r14 corpus (test alternative explanation a, ~$1.0)
OR pivot to v6 architectural test: explicit L_attention_diffusion loss term (test option B, requires loss composition redesign + multi-backbone test, ~$3-5)
OR document v5 PRELIMINARY FAIL status + v6 hypothesis as evidence chain, defer larger test to user-confirmed cycle
